headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani’s picks take key House primaries amid a broad battle over Democrats’ direction
headlines.description: Three of the New York mayor’s candidates have won contested races, part of a slate of House primaries flush with influence and campaign cash.

headlines.title: Senate rebukes Trump by approving House-passed measure calling for end to Iran war
headlines.description: The largely symbolic measure passed as the U.S. and Iran are in the early stages of talks aimed at ending the war.

headlines.title: Maryland Senate president defeats Democratic primary challenger amid redistricting anger
headlines.description: Senate President Bill Ferguson defeated activist Bobby LaPin in the legislative race in Baltimore, The Associated Press projected.

headlines.title: Bill Gates told Congress he suspected Jeffrey Epstein ‘contemplated blackmailing’ him over affairs
headlines.description: Gates also said he knew Epstein had a criminal conviction of a “sexual nature,” which he said he “probably should have” dug into.

headlines.title: ‘Glorious time to be a New Yorker’: Brad Lander addresses his voters after NY-10 projected primary win
headlines.description: After his projected primary win over Rep. Dan Goldman in the 10th Congressional District, former City Comptroller Brad Lander met with supporters to express his gratitude and commended New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani for his recent achievements. Mamdani introduced Lander, describing him as a “good neighbor” and someone who will “always” have their back.

headlines.title: House releases Bill Gates’ Epstein testimony
headlines.description: The House Oversight Committee released the transcript of Bill Gates’ closed-door testimony on his relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffery Epstein. Gates said he believed Epstein “contemplated blackmailing him” over extramarital affairs. NBC News’ Melanie Zanona reports.

headlines.title: Espaillat projected to lose primary to Mamdani-backed Darializa Avila Chevalier
headlines.description: Rep. Adriano Espaillat, D-N.Y., is projected to lose his primary to community organizer and activist Darializa Avila Chevalier, backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani, in a major victory for the progressive wing of the Democratic Party.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: New York Democrat Micah Lasher wins House primary that drew big spending from AI groups
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Lasher, who was backed by retiring Rep. Jerry Nadler, emerged from a crowded field in the Manhattan-based 12th District.

headlines.title: Democratic Rep. Adriano Espaillat loses primary to Mamdani-backed Darializa Avila Chevalier
headlines.description: Avila Chevalier, a democratic socialist and community organizer, defeated the five-term congressman, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: MLB stands by warning to players over Pride Night protest but faults Giants for poor communication
headlines.description: In a letter to Sen. Josh Hawley, Major League Baseball denied it targeted players who oppose gay rights and partially blamed the San Francisco Giants for the team’s Pride Night fiasco.
